query:
INSERT INTO siteContent (section, `key`, value) VALUES
-- Hero section
('hero', 'headline', 'Your Vehicle. Perfected. At Your Door.'),
('hero', 'subheadline', 'Detailing Labs brings showroom-quality results directly to you. Professional mobile detailing at your home, office, or anywhere that works — no drop-off required.'),
('hero', 'badge', 'PREMIUM MOBILE DETAILING'),
('hero', 'cta_primary', 'Book Your Detail'),
('hero', 'cta_secondary', 'View Services'),
('hero', 'trust_reviews', '5.0 · 200+ reviews'),
('hero', 'trust_certified', 'Fully insured & certified'),
('hero', 'trust_availability', 'Same-week availability'),
-- About section
('about', 'headline', 'Precision Detailing, Delivered to You'),
('about', 'body', 'Detailing Labs was founded on a simple belief: your vehicle deserves professional care without the hassle of drop-offs and waiting rooms. Our mobile team brings professional-grade equipment and premium products directly to your location.'),
('about', 'years_experience', '8+'),
('about', 'vehicles_detailed', '2,500+'),
('about', 'satisfaction_rate', '99%'),
('about', 'service_areas', '15+'),
-- Contact section
('contact', 'phone', '(555) 000-0000'),
('contact', 'email', 'hello@detailinglabs.com'),
('contact', 'address', 'Milwaukee, WI'),
('contact', 'hours_weekday', 'Mon–Fri: 7:00 AM – 7:00 PM'),
('contact', 'hours_weekend', 'Sat–Sun: 8:00 AM – 5:00 PM'),
-- FAQ entries (stored as JSON array per entry)
('faq', 'item_1_q', 'How far in advance do I need to book?'),
('faq', 'item_1_a', 'We recommend booking at least 48 hours in advance, but same-week appointments are often available. Use our online booking system to check real-time availability.'),
('faq', 'item_2_q', 'What do I need to provide?'),
('faq', 'item_2_a', 'Just your vehicle and access to it! We bring all equipment, water, and products. A standard 110V outlet nearby is helpful for interior work but not always required.'),
('faq', 'item_3_q', 'How long does a detail take?'),
('faq', 'item_3_a', 'Times vary by package: Essential Detail ~2 hours, Premium Detail ~4 hours, Signature Full Detail ~6 hours, and Ceramic Coating packages ~8-9 hours.'),
('faq', 'item_4_q', 'Do you service my area?'),
('faq', 'item_4_a', 'We currently serve the greater Milwaukee metro area and surrounding communities within 30 miles. Enter your zip code during booking to confirm availability in your area.'),
('faq', 'item_5_q', 'What payment methods do you accept?'),
('faq', 'item_5_a', 'We accept all major credit cards, debit cards, Venmo, Zelle, and cash. Payment is collected at the time of service completion.'),
('faq', 'item_6_q', 'Is your work guaranteed?'),
('faq', 'item_6_a', 'Absolutely. We stand behind every detail. If you are not completely satisfied, contact us within 48 hours and we will make it right at no additional charge.'),
-- Services section tagline
('services', 'tagline', 'Every service is performed by trained professionals using premium products. We treat your vehicle like it is our own.'),
-- Business info
('business', 'name', 'Detailing Labs'),
('business', 'tagline', 'Premium Mobile Auto Detailing'),
('business', 'tax_rate', '0.0825'),
('business', 'travel_fee_base', '0'),
('business', 'service_radius_miles', '30'),
('business', 'booking_advance_hours', '24')
ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE value = VALUES(value);
